title: Blunderous
description: Blunderous is a card-based auto battler that is being developed independently by my company Goosebox Games for an eventual release on Steam.

title: Raycaster
description: A 3D raytracer implemented in C#, based on Peter Shirley's 'Ray Tracing in One Weekend' tutorial. Contains both sequential and parallelized versions. This project was an interesting challenge that provided some valuable knowledge into rendering pipelines and industry standards when it comes to optimisation. Recieved a grading of 95/100.

title: Kritter Valley
description: Kritter Valley was a hobby game dev project that provided a lot of skills and stylistic choices I use in my creative work today. It's a project I'm quite proud of and look forward to returning to it someday to fully flesh out the many ideas I've had for it.

title: GRIDLAST
description: GRIDLAST is a card-based strategy game developed in 72 hours for Ludum Dare 50, placing 34th overall. The game has you evade zombies by moving a character on a grid and defeating enemies using different cards.

title: BRICKBONE
description: BRICKBONE was a small project to teach myself procedural island generation and some more advanced multiplayer netcode.

title: gunstable
description: GUNSTABLE MAYHEM is a classic arcade-y platformer game developed in 72 hours for Ludum Dare 49.

title: The Plummet
description: The Plummet is a platforming stealth game where you must travel as deep into the procedurally generated depths as possible. Developed in 72 hours for Ludum Dare 48.

title: Bullet Time
description: BULLET TIME is a top-down stealth game with time-travel mechanics. Developed in 72 hours with a friend for Ludum Dare 47.
